title: New Alaska Live TV – August 15 @ 7:00 p.m. on KUAC TV 9.1
summary: Alaska Live TV showcases local and visiting musicians in performance at the KUAC studios. In this episode, recorded this April, enjoy a performance from the UAF Vocal Studio, hosted by Lori Neufeld!

title: ETIPP: Community Energy Education
summary: Energy Technology Innovation (ETIPP): Empowering Communities Through Energy Education Energy education is new to the Energy Technology Innovation Partnership Project (ETIPP) . The community of McGrath, Alaska participated in hands-on activities in early August with REAP staff and partners. title: AFN Meets with Secretary Pete Buttigieg
summary: ANCHORAGE, AK – Today, Secretary of Transportation Pete Buttigieg met with the Alaska Federation of Natives (AFN) in Anchorage.
